form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at his last couple but he goes well over this track and distance with two wins from three starts. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on first turn and lost ground.
Went up with lids and slow to begin.
Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 350m (19.87) beating Runway Storm in Maiden on April 10. Can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Has finished eighth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 13 lengths behind Aston Rochelle over 350m. This will test.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in seven tries. Last start 6th over 350m at this track. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when third (26.05) at Ballarat, making it two placings on end. Tricky draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 350m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (19.76) behind Aston Rochelle in a T3 RSTW on April 3. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.
